title: signing_unavailable error message embeds wolfhsm version number
description: The string 'the wolfhsm 0.1.0 crate does not expose an API...' will be stale as soon as wolfhsm 0.2.0 is released (even if signing is still not implemented). A user on 0.2.0 will see a misleading error. Fix: remove the version number — just say 'the wolfhsm crate does not yet expose EccP256Key::load_from_nvm'.
